name: Ted
history: PhD student in a science field. Deep involvement in music; previously led a college band and currently participates in a jazz group. Offered a leadership position in the jazz group and declined. Reports mental health struggles. Feels disconnected from colleagues in the scientific work environment due to differing values and work habits.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must maintain control to avoid chaos.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't control everything, things will fall apart.
coping_strategies: Uses humor and joking to deflect from difficult topics and emotions.
situation: Experiencing difficulty during jazz rehearsals, requiring repeated attempts to progress.
auto_thought: I can't let go or things will get out of control.
behavior: Avoids discussing deeper issues by joking and changing topics.
